data.description: Investigate and fix the Knots bug where a merge-triggered knots sync/import can restore an older knot title/state even though newer local implementation, review, and shipment notes/tags are already attached. The concrete failure mode observed on 2026-04-13: knot 21fe had been advanced locally through implementation review and shipment, then a merge imported knots updates and the knot snapped back to its older READY_FOR_PLANNING metadata while retaining newer notes and branch/commit tags. The fix should preserve the latest authoritative knot state and metadata across sync/import, or surface a safe recovery path that does not require manual re-advancement.
